goal: HTML output visually identical to original PPTX rendering

stories.title: Shape fill renders only inside SVG path boundary
acceptanceCriteria: Ellipse/circle shapes show color ONLY within the circular area, not the rectangular bounding box
Triangle shapes show color ONLY within the triangular area
RoundRect shapes show rounded corners visually (not sharp rectangle with color)
No background-color CSS on .shape div when SVG is used

stories.title: Connector lines render with correct color and width
acceptanceCriteria: Red connectors (#C00000) render with red SVG stroke
Blue connectors (#0000FF) render with blue SVG stroke
stroke-width matches <a:ln w='...'/> EMU value converted to pt
Theme color connectors (tx1) resolve to actual theme dark1 color

stories.title: Text color inside shapes matches PPTX exactly
acceptanceCriteria: Text with explicit srgbClr (e.g., #0070C0) renders in that color
Text with schemeClr (e.g., BACKGROUND_1) resolves to correct theme color
White text on dark shapes is visible (not black-on-dark)
No text color defaults to inherited/theme color, not hardcoded black

stories.title: Image crop shows correct visible region
acceptanceCriteria: Cropped images display the correct portion of the source image
Image fills the shape bounding box after crop (no gaps or overflow)
Banner images (e.g., 960x18px crop from larger image) display correctly

stories.title: Background images from master/layout render correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Slide backgrounds with blipFill show the image
Master/layout background images inherited by slides
Background image covers full slide area (background-size: cover)

stories.title: Gradient fills render correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Linear gradients render with correct direction and color stops
Gradient stops use correct theme-resolved colors
CSS linear-gradient output matches PPTX gradient definition

stories.title: Text wrapping and autofit match PPTX layout
acceptanceCriteria: fontScale auto-fit reduces text size to fit shape
Word wrapping breaks at same positions as PPTX (within 1 word tolerance)
Text insets (lIns/tIns/rIns/bIns) correctly offset text from shape edge

stories.title: Group shape children positioned correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Group child shapes positioned relative to group bounding box
chOff/chExt coordinate transform applied correctly
No double-offset from group position + child absolute position
